rules.name: run make format/lint/test before creating a PR
rules.evidence: When you modify code in any library, run the following commands in that library's directory before creating a pull request: `make format`, `make lint`, `make test`

rules.name: no Sphinx-style double backticks in docstrings/comments (Edit)
rules.evidence: Do NOT use Sphinx-style double backtick formatting (` ``code`` `). Use single backticks (`` `code` ``) for inline code references in docstrings and comments.

rules.name: no Sphinx-style double backticks in docstrings/comments (Write)
rules.evidence: Do NOT use Sphinx-style double backtick formatting (` ``code`` `). Use single backticks (`` `code` ``) for inline code references in docstrings and comments.

uncompilable: Monorepo structure note (libraries live under libs/) — descriptive, not an obligation/prohibition on an action.
Libraries overview list (checkpoint, cli, langgraph, sdk-py, etc.) — usage catalog/documentation, no attached obligation.
TEST variable usage for running a specific test file or extra pytest options — documentation of an option, not a trigger-bound requirement.
Dependency map note that changes to a library may impact its dependents — informational context, no specific action or command is prescribed.
